browsers.label: Visited but didn't buy
browsers.recommended_action: Retarget with discount code. Subject: 'Still thinking it over? Here's 10% off'

one_time.label: Bought 1 product
one_time.recommended_action: Cross-sell related products. Subject: 'You might also like...'

repeat.label: Bought 2+ products
repeat.recommended_action: Loyalty program invite + early access to new drops

high_value.label: Spent $50+
high_value.recommended_action: VIP treatment. Exclusive bundles, personal thank-you, referral program

lead_magnet.label: Got free product only
lead_magnet.recommended_action: Nurture sequence. Send 3 value emails then soft pitch paid product
